title: Connection issues in Fortnite

evidence.content: I don’t even know where to start with this abomination. eFootball is a disgrace, a joke and an insult to anyone who actually likes football games. Even on a top-tier PC, you get input delays, stuttering and lag that make you wonder if you’re controlling a snail on ice. How is it 2026 and we’re still

eFootball 2026 is a disaster. Four years of updates have only made it worse: clunky gameplay, broken AI, ugly graphics, and missing modes like Master League. The menus are a mess, online play is unstable, and the whole thing feels like an unfinished beta. Konami has betrayed PES fans—this is one of

imagine the worst last installment of PES, now imagine playing it with cashgrab and predatory gacha, plus horrible connection that makes it harder to control your player. you got the perfect recipe for this game.

Actually the game is unplayable in my PC. I wanted to use my switch pro controller and it was imposible to configure it propely. I tryed to set pass with the "B" button but it recogized it as "B" for the xbox layout that its in the "A" for switch. So when i press "B" in my controller the players mad
